items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Small Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
This is a two-in-one iconic piece. The petite Liz bag features a double-sided Cubic cotton canvas design, showcasing the brand's multidimensional character. Inside the shopping bag hides a detachable zippered clutch that can be used separately as a classic shoulder bag.
Size: 29*14*25cm
Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Cognac / Brown 🁢

items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Beige Small Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
·Cp Exclusive®️ Classic Upgraded Off-White
This small shopping bag is made of classic Visetos, continuing the Liz bag's traditional elegance in daily life. The other side of the bag is made of Cubic classic print, adding another layer of design depth. The lightweight silhouette can be adjusted via a leather drawstring on the side to adapt to the dynamic changes of modern life. The detachable zippered clutch can serve as a classic shoulder bag for short trips and night outs, becoming the highlight of this bag's design.
Size: 29*14*25cm
Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Beige / Beige 🖱️

💰

items.name_en: MCM New Soft Berlin Visetos Shoulder Bag, embodying the concept of combining elegance with portability, this bag is meticulously crafted as a miniaturized version of a classic suitcase. Nappa leather details and the edge-painted corners outlining the classic Visetos silhouette highlight the brand's craftsmanship. A double-zipper closure ensures the safety of small daily essentials inside the luxurious fabric lining. You can carry this exquisite bag by the soft leather handle or use the leather shoulder strap for hands-free functionality. Dimensions: 14-21-8, Style No.: 65014

MCM Stark Visetos
Bebe Boo Rivet Backpack
dp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Officially called X mini# This is a miniature version of the classic MCM. We use the iconic Visetos coated canvas with a luxurious faux leather lining and riveted trim. The item fits various looks; the innovative design allows the strap to instantly transform it into a crossbody bag, backpack, shoulder bag, waist bag, and handbag. Show off your new style with this extra-mini Stark backpack.

Size: 21*10*17.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown

items.name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Mini Rivet Backpack
dp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Officially called mini# This classic Stark backpack features the iconic Visetos pattern and Nappa leather, a pioneer in the daily luxury field. Multi-faceted rivets outline the silhouette of the bag, embodying MCM's unique rebellious spirit. The bag features an outer pocket, a front zip pocket, and an internal compartment for tablets and small electronics, showcasing modern functionality that complements its contemporary look.
Model: MMK6SVE37CO001
Size: 26*10.5*21.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown

items.name_cn:
Medium
👄Dior New Toujours Handbag, this Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the 2023 Spring/Summer show. Its casual and practical design is unique, crafted from imported calfskin and finished with oversized woven quilting. The spacious interior compartment with a small pocket allows for neat storage of daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D rotary clasp, adjustable sides to enhance style, and a leather handle with adjustable details for easy carrying! CD Lock and strap closure with Dior charm, detachable inner pocket, adjustable leather handle, includes dust bag! Model: M1188m, Size: 28.5x19x21.5cm.
